title: Centaur Horse & Spider (Discontinued)
description: [ Java Port ] Adds the horse mob and spider mob with centaurs and spider centaurs
body:
[Requires Optifine]

[For Fabric, Forge, & NeoForge Users:]

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric

From the assets of the Player Mob Models Pack.

This resource pack turns horse and spider into centaurs, one is arachne and one is centuar, with unique model for spider and yada yada. The horse also spawns a spider centaur model that looks more friendlier unlike the hostile look for the spiders, and also, if you want to ride the spider monstrous textures, you can rename the horse with available name tag lists inside the pack file.

**_This pack also supports on BEDROCK VERSION, all you need is to rename .zip to .mcpack_**

**[PACK] HOW TO USE THESE "MICROPACKS":**

Micropacks are small resource packs that modify the model or the texture of the pack, to do this, you opem the pack file, extract the micropacks folder, and then select any micropacks that you want to use, and then drag them on resourcepacks folder, and then apply above the main pack file. If the micropacks show errors, press fn+f3+t, if it still is broken, please message me on Curseforge or PlanetMinecraft

 

Check out my Youtube channel, I make Youtube videos: https://youtube.com/@siberiamcnuggets

 

Make sure to check out my PlanetMinecraft Site, It's my main place: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/stalkermcnuggets/
